linkedin.description: LinkedIn telemetry: sensor/metrics collection, conversion tracking, ad pixel, adblock-detection script, internal Piwik, marketing tag system, LMS analytics, and lnkd.in redirector.

fingerprint_vendors.description: Client-side fingerprinting and anti-bot vendors: Fingerprint Pro, open-source FingerprintJS CDN, DataDome, PerimeterX/HUMAN, Sift, Forter, ThreatMetrix/TransUnion, Iovation, Kasada, Sardine, Shape Security/F5. Includes current Fingerprint CDN/API domains, api.fpjs.pro, npm loader CDN, HUMAN sensor/connect hosts, and Sift JS/CSP plus api.sift.com hosts.

captcha_vendors.description: CAPTCHA / device-attestation vendors (Arkose Labs, FunCAPTCHA). DISABLED BY DEFAULT — blocking these will break logins on sites that use them as CAPTCHA challenges (X signup, Roblox, several crypto exchanges, some enterprise SSO flows).

session_replay.description: Session-replay, heatmap, and product-analytics vendors that record user interaction: FullStory, LogRocket, Mouseflow, Contentsquare, Smartlook, Quantum Metric, Microsoft Clarity, Heap, Pendo, Lucky Orange, Inspectlet, Browsee, and Sentry Replay CDN bundles. Includes current LogRocket CSP host family, Clarity c.bing.com, and Heap heap-api/heapanalytics plus classic replay auryc hosts.

datadog_rum.description: Datadog Real User Monitoring intake endpoints (US1, US3, US5, EU1, US1-FED, AP1, AP2) and browser agent CDN. DISABLED BY DEFAULT — Datadog RUM is also widely used for legitimate performance and error monitoring that site operators and users may want to keep.
